title: Better Cobblemon Spawns
description: I am attempting to update the cobblemon spawn conditions so that pokemon like dratini are easier to find and dont only spawn at Y Level 32 and below.
body:
• For Cobblemon 1.6+ • Minecraft 1.21.1+

Tired of hunting for rare pokemon only to realize they only spawn in incredibly niche circumstances? Wish Pokémon spawns made a little more sense?

Better Cobblemon Spawns is a custom datapack that improves the way Pokémon spawn in your world by refining spawn conditions across various biomes, times, and weather patterns.

**Features**

✅ More accurate biome-based Pokémon spawns (Dratini now spawns in any ocean biome, not just underground water sources)

🌤️ Time-of-day and weather-based spawning logic (Pokemon like gastly spawn above ground during  night now instead of only underground)

🌍 Rare Pokémon now spawn in a  larger variety of locations (but keep their rarity and stay lore accurate)

🧪 Configurable to suit your custom world or server

💬 Designed to stay lore-friendly without disrupting spawn balancing too much.


**Notes**

Please feel free to message me any requests for any pokemon you think need their spawn conditions updated. My Discord is **gxbrielarocha**.

I plan on eventually adding updated spawn conditions for pokemon in alt mods like Mystic Mons etc. But for the moment I am focussing on pokemon that are added in the base cobblemon modpack. But please. If a pokemon has bad spawn conditions in another modpack let me know and I will gladly update their spawn conditions.
